mapper.select:
SELECT ds.id, ds.doctor_id AS doctorId, ds.schedule_date AS scheduleDate, ds.shift, dp.department, dp.name AS doctorName, dp.name AS name, dp.title, CASE WHEN ds.status = 0 THEN '停诊' ELSE ds.shift END AS attendanceStatus, ds.level, COALESCE(ds.registration_limit, 0) AS `limit`, COALESCE(ds.registration_limit, 0) AS remain, ds.status FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN doctor_profile dp ON dp.id = ds.doctor_id
ORDER BY ds.schedule_date DESC, ds.shift ASC, ds.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN doctor_profile dp ON dp.id = ds.doctor_id

SELECT doctor_id AS doctorId, schedule_date AS scheduleDate, COUNT(*) AS usedCount FROM outpatient_registration WHERE
(doctor_id = #{schedule.doctorId} AND schedule_date = #{schedule.scheduleDate})
GROUP BY doctor_id, schedule_date
